testimonials.name: Rajneesh Kumar
testimonials.text: When I moved to a completely new city from my hometown, RoomLelo really helped me to find an affordable place to live and assisted me with other requirements. Great Initiative.

testimonials.name: Suryansh Kumar
testimonials.text: Cannot be more thankful to you RoomLelo for your existence. Saved my time, effort and money by simply booking the flat online from your website. Move-in was quick and easy.

testimonials.name: Swapnil Singh
testimonials.text: Once my fan got out of order in the late evening, they solved it within an hour. Kept their promise of quick maintenance.

benefits.title: Free Listing
benefits.description: You won't have to worry about paying any amount for better audience engagement unlike other property search platforms.

benefits.title: Rent on Time
benefits.description: You won't have to worry about rent delays or defaults, once associated with us.

benefits.title: Verified tenants
benefits.description: You won't have to worry about problematic tenants or possession of valid Identity Proof of Tenant's, once associated with us.

benefits.title: Owners Dashboard
benefits.description: You will get to access all relevant details from your customized dashboard on our exclusive Partners app.
